name: FileUpload
description: Drag-and-drop file dropzone with progress and validation.

api.name: FileUpload
api.description: Drag-and-drop file dropzone with progress and validation.

parameters.name: Size
parameters.description: Size of the trigger when Variant="Button". Mirrors ButtonSize so a button-variant FileUpload can match neighbouring buttons in toolbars or compact forms. Has no visual effect on Dropzone or Avatar variants today.

parameters.name: OnUpload
parameters.description: Consumer-supplied upload handler. Called once per file after selection (or after explicit StartUploadAsync if AutoUpload is false). Receives the item, an IProgress{T} for reporting percent 0-100, and a CancellationToken that fires if the user clicks Cancel. Should return the server-assigned URL/id on success, or throw/return null on failure.

parameters.name: AutoUpload
parameters.description: When true (default), uploads begin immediately after files are selected. When false, the user must click the Upload button to start. Requires OnUpload to be set.

parameters.name: MaxConcurrentUploads
parameters.description: Maximum number of OnUpload calls running simultaneously.

parameters.name: ChunkSize
parameters.description: Optional chunk size hint (bytes) for consumers that want to implement chunked/resumable upload inside their OnUpload handler. The component passes this value through ChunkSize but does NOT implement chunking itself.

parameters.name: OnFilesSelected
parameters.description: Fires when files are selected (raw args, kept for back-compat).

parameters.name: OnFileUploaded
parameters.description: Fires each time a file upload succeeds.

parameters.name: OnAllUploaded
parameters.description: Fires when all queued uploads have finished (succeeded, failed, or cancelled).

parameters.name: OnFileFailed
parameters.description: Fires each time a file upload fails.

parameters.name: OnFileRemoved
parameters.description: Fires when a file is removed from the list.

parameters.name: OnFileRejected
parameters.description: Fires when a file is rejected due to type/size/count constraints.

events.name: OnFilesSelected
events.description: Fires when files are selected (raw args, kept for back-compat).

events.name: OnFileUploaded
events.description: Fires each time a file upload succeeds.

events.name: OnAllUploaded
events.description: Fires when all queued uploads have finished (succeeded, failed, or cancelled).

events.name: OnFileFailed
events.description: Fires each time a file upload fails.

events.name: OnFileRemoved
events.description: Fires when a file is removed from the list.

events.name: OnFileRejected
events.description: Fires when a file is rejected due to type/size/count constraints.

examples.title: Image Upload
examples.code:
<FileUpload
    Label="Upload an image"
    Description="PNG, JPG or GIF up to 10MB"
    Accept="image/*"
    OnFilesSelected="HandleFiles" />

examples.title: Multiple Files
examples.code:
<FileUpload
    Label="Upload documents"
    Description="Select one or more files"
    Multiple="true"
    OnFilesSelected="HandleFiles" />

examples.title: Upload with progress (fake delay)
examples.code:
<FileUpload
    Multiple="true"
    Label="Upload files"
    OnUpload="@SimulateUpload"
    OnFileUploaded="@(item => _uploadedCount++)"
    OnAllUploaded="@(items => _allDoneMsg = $"All {items.Count} file(s) done!")"  />

@code {
    private async Task<string?> SimulateUpload(
        FileUpload.FileUploadItem item,
        IProgress<int> progress,
        CancellationToken ct)
    {
        for (int pct = 0; pct <= 100; pct += 10)
        {
            ct.ThrowIfCancellationRequested();
            progress.Report(pct);
            await Task.Delay(50, ct);
        }
        return $"https://cdn.example.com/{item.Name}";
    }
}

mdSummary:
# FileUpload

Drag-and-drop file dropzone with progress and validation.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Forms/Specialized
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/file-upload

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| FileUpload | FormField | `FormField.FormFieldContext?` | `` |  |
| FileUpload | Required | `bool` | `` |  |
| FileUpload | Invalid | `bool` | `` |  |
| FileUpload | ErrorText | `string?` | `` |  |
| FileUpload | HelperText | `string?` | `` |  |
| FileUpload | Name | `string?` | `` |  |
| FileUpload | Label | `string?` | `` |  |
| FileUpload | Description | `string?` | `` |  |
| FileUpload | Multiple | `bool` | `` |  |
| FileUpload | Accept | `string?` | `` |  |
| FileUpload | MaxFileSize | `long` | `10 * 1024 * 1024` |  |
| FileUpload | MaxFiles | `int` | `10` |  |
| FileUpload | ShowThumbnails | `bool` | `` |  |
| FileUpload | FileTemplate | `RenderFragment<IBrowserFile>?` | `` |  |
| FileUpload | Variant | `FileUploadVariant` | `FileUploadVariant.Dropzone` |  |
| FileUpload | Size | `Lumeo.Size` | `Lumeo.Size.Md` | Size of the trigger when Variant="Button". Mirrors ButtonSize so a button-variant FileUpload can match neighbouring buttons in toolbars or compact forms. Has no visual effect on Dropzone or Avatar variants today. |
| FileUpload | ShowProgress | `bool` | `` |  |
| FileUpload | Progress | `int` | `` |  |
| FileUpload | OnUpload | `Func<FileUploadItem, IProgress<int>, CancellationToken, Task<string?>>?` | `` | Consumer-supplied upload handler. Called once per file after selection (or after explicit StartUploadAsync if AutoUpload is false). Receives the item, an IProgress{T} for reporting percent 0-100, and a CancellationToken that fires if the user clicks Cancel. Should return the server-assigned URL/id on success, or throw/return null on failure. |
| FileUpload | AutoUpload | `bool` | `true` | When true (default), uploads begin immediately after files are selected. When false, the user must click the Upload button to start. Requires OnUpload to be set. |
| FileUpload | MaxConcurrentUploads | `int` | `3` | Maximum number of OnUpload calls running simultaneously. |
| FileUpload | ChunkSize | `long?` | `` | Optional chunk size hint (bytes) for consumers that want to implement chunked/resumable upload inside their OnUpload handler. The component passes this value through ChunkSize but does NOT implement chunking itself. |
| FileUpload | MaxFileSizeError | `string?` | `` |  |
| FileUpload | MaxFilesError | `string?` | `` |  |
| FileUpload | FileTypeError | `string?` | `` |  |
| FileUpload | OnFilesSelected | `EventCallback<InputFileChangeEventArgs>` | `` | Fires when files are selected (raw args, kept for back-compat). |
| FileUpload | OnFileUploaded | `EventCallback<FileUploadItem>` | `` | Fires each time a file upload succeeds. |
| FileUpload | OnAllUploaded | `EventCallback<IReadOnlyList<FileUploadItem>>` | `` | Fires when all queued uploads have finished (succeeded, failed, or cancelled). |
| FileUpload | OnFileFailed | `EventCallback<FileUploadItem>` | `` | Fires each time a file upload fails. |
| FileUpload | OnFileRemoved | `EventCallback<FileUploadItem>` | `` | Fires when a file is removed from the list. |
| FileUpload | OnFileRejected | `EventCallback<(IBrowserFile File, string Reason)>` | `` | Fires when a file is rejected due to type/size/count constraints. |
| FileUpload | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| FileUpload | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `FileTemplate` (FileUpload) — RenderFragment slot

## Events
- `OnFilesSelected` (`EventCallback<InputFileChangeEventArgs>`) — Fires when files are selected (raw args, kept for back-compat).
- `OnFileUploaded` (`EventCallback<FileUploadItem>`) — Fires each time a file upload succeeds.
- `OnAllUploaded` (`EventCallback<IReadOnlyList<FileUploadItem>>`) — Fires when all queued uploads have finished (succeeded, failed, or cancelled).
- `OnFileFailed` (`EventCallback<FileUploadItem>`) — Fires each time a file upload fails.
- `OnFileRemoved` (`EventCallback<FileUploadItem>`) — Fires when a file is removed from the list.
- `OnFileRejected` (`EventCallback<(IBrowserFile File, string Reason)>`) — Fires when a file is rejected due to type/size/count constraints.

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- `FormField` (`FormField.FormFieldContext?`)

## Services it injects
- `ILumeoLocalizer` (Lumeo.Services.Localization)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<FileUpload />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-background`, `--color-border`, `--color-destructive`, `--color-input`, `--color-muted`, `--color-muted-foreground`, `--color-primary`, `--color-primary-foreground`, `--color-ring`, `--radius`

## Files
- `UI/FileUpload/FileUpload.razor`
